subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter of the seventh of Rabi'u'l-Avval was received. I swear by the precious life of this 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ۷ ربیع الاول وصول یافت ولی بجان عزیز آن عبدالبهاء قسم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
